heading: General exceptions
label: 1647c General exceptions
text: The requirements of this subchapter shall not apply to any excepted benefits described in paragraph (1)(A) or (3) of .section 300gg–91(c) of title 42
notes: Codificationis based on section 158 of title I of S. 1790, One Hundred Eleventh Congress, as reported by the Committee on Indian Affairs of the Senate in Dec. 2009, which was enacted into law by .Section 410 of Pub. L. 94–437section 10221(a) of Pub. L. 111–148
